name: Star Equity Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I General Star Equity Holdings, Inc. (Star Equity, Star, the Company, we, or our, formerly known as Hudson Global, Inc. (Hudson)) is a diversified multi-industry holding company operating through four reportable segments: Building Solutions, Business Services, Energy Services, and Investments. Our common stock and 10% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock are listed on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbols STRR and STRRP, respectively.
